findings.message: post_item function docstring claims 'owner_email stored' but the implementation discards the owner_email from payload. The create_item(session, payload.name) call does not pass payload.owner_email, so user-provided PII is silently dropped.
findings.suggestion: Either pass owner_email to create_item: return create_item(session, payload.name, payload.owner_email), or remove owner_email from ItemCreate schema and docstring to match the actual behavior.
